label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > undifferentiated spermatogonia
text: A cell with elevated nanos2-like and stem-associated spermatogonial markers is likely undifferentiated spermatogonia.
notes: marker list is starter-level and pending curation

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > differentiating spermatogonia
text: A cell transitioning away from undifferentiated spermatogonia toward meiosis can be labeled differentiating spermatogonia.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > pachytene
text: A meiotic prophase profile with strong synaptonemal-complex-associated signal may indicate pachytene spermatocyte.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > Sertoli cell
text: A supporting somatic profile with canonical Sertoli-like marker expression should map to Sertoli cell.
Immune-like transcript signatures should map to the broad immune cell class when finer resolution is unavailable.
